tagline.en: The dinosaur leaves are ready to pick!
tagline.da: Dinosaurbladene er klar til at plukke!

theme.hero_task: Pick first kale leaves that look like dinosaur skin

tasks.action: Pick first kale leaves from Bed C

prompt.en: Snap off the lowest big leaves -- feel the bumpy texture, just like dinosaur skin!
prompt.da: Knaek de nederste store blade af -- maaerk den knoldrede overflade, ligesom dinosaurhud!

prompt.en: Strawberry patrol! How many red ones today?
prompt.da: Jordbaerpatrulje! Hvor mange roede i dag?

prompt.en: Hot week coming -- water deeply so roots stay happy.
prompt.da: Varm uge paa vej -- vand dybt saa roedderne har det godt.

tasks.action: Harvest pea pods from Bed C

prompt.en: Check the trellis top to bottom -- pods hide behind the leaves!
prompt.da: Tjek espalieren fra top til bund -- skuller gemmer sig bag bladene!

tasks.action: Trim any brown or dead leaves from strawberries

prompt.en: Pull off any brown leaves so the plant puts energy into making berries!
prompt.da: Fjern brune blade saa planten bruger energien paa at lave baer!

growth_events.event: Kale leaves large enough for first harvest

prompt.en: The kale leaves are huge! Feel the bumpy texture -- they look like dinosaur skin!
prompt.da: Groenkalsbladene er kaempestore! Maaerk den knoldrede overflade -- de ligner dinosaurhud!

growth_events.event: Tomato plants flowering heavily with yellow clusters

prompt.en: Count the yellow flower clusters -- each cluster will become tomatoes!
prompt.da: Tael de gule blomsterklaser -- hver klase bliver til tomater!

sowing_tasks.action: Sow sixth succession radish in Bed D
